# rust-fancy-regex0.17

Compatibility package for the released MIT `fancy-regex 0.17.0` crate required
by `tiktoken-rs 0.11`. Fedora omits the benchmark-only Criterion dependency but
retains all published library and integration tests. The package is enabled for
Fedora 43, Fedora 44, and Rawhide on `x86_64` and `aarch64`; live build and
artifact results are retained in the project playbook.
